flaws.description: src/beacon_ingest/config.py:16 unsafe-yaml-load (real, non-decoy) is never emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in any auditRuns entry — a false negative.
src/beacon_ingest/server.py:43 shell-injection (decoy: fixed argv, shell=False) IS emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in every auditRuns entry — a false positive.
